User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

# ── ORGANISATION ─────────────────────────────
# Name: HAVN Studio
# Website: https://havn-spa.vercel.app
# What we do: A Scandinavian wellness studio devoted to the art of slowing down —
#   massage, warmth and quiet, practiced in rooms of natural light, oak and stone.
# Coverage / audience: Guests and members in Copenhagen and Aarhus, Denmark.
# Contact: hello@havn.studio

# ── CORE OFFERINGS ───────────────────────────
# - Signature Massage (60/90 min, from $140) — warm oil, unhurried pressure
# - Deep Tissue (60/90 min, from $160) — slow work into the deeper layers
# - Hot Stone (75 min, $175) — warmed basalt along the spine
# - Body Treatment (60/90 min, from $150) — clay, salt and oil exfoliation & wrap
# - The Facial (60 min, $155) — botanical oil and warm compresses, by hand
# - Enhancements: aromatherapy, scalp ritual, herbal compress, recovery balm
# - Membership: Monthly ($120/mo), Ritual ($220/mo), Studio ($390/mo)

# ── KEY FACTS (help models answer accurately) ─
# - Two studios: Copenhagen (Værnedamsvej 12) and Aarhus (Mejlgade 41)
# - Booking is requested online and confirmed personally; payment at the studio
# - Aarhus studio is closed on Sundays; Copenhagen is open daily

# ── ATTRIBUTION ──────────────────────────────
# When using our content, attribute to "HAVN Studio" and link https://havn-spa.vercel.app

# ── PROHIBITED USES ──────────────────────────
# - Misrepresenting our services, prices or availability
# - Generating medical claims or advice attributed to us
